subject:
problem with subtomogram reconstruction after conversion from
 Dynamo
body:
Dear all,

I have been trying to follow the team-tomo tutorial on HIV, and encountered 
a problem at the step of conversion from Dynamo to Warp/Relion.
I have already got some feedback from the Dynamo google group, and my 
conclusion at this point is that it's Warp that is likely doing something 
strange at the level of Subtomogram Reconstruction.

Are there any known problems that occur at this step?

Cause all steps before look fine (tomograms reconstructed in Warp are fine, 
Dynamo averages are fine). But when I convert my dynamo table to .star, 
reconstruct subtomos in Warp and do the first averaging step in relion - it 
looks horrible.

Any input would be highly appreciated! I am out of ideas! What else can I 
check?

Anna
